ErrorMessage: You need to assign a deal type to this Opportunity.
Description: Requires the type field to be something other than -- None --

ErrorMessage: Please ensure the notify field is completed
ErrorConditionFormula: AND(NOT($Profile.Name ="Compliance Team"),NOT(ISPICKVAL( Notifiy__c ,"No requirement")),NOT(ISPICKVAL( Notifiy__c ,"Billing Team")))

ErrorMessage: Company ERP must be set to allow creation of a Sales Order.
ErrorConditionFormula: IF(AND( IWM_Sales_Order_Req__c , ISBLANK( Company_ERP__c )), True, False)

ErrorMessage: SalesOrder Required can only be set to True (Checked) once the Opportunity is at Closed Won
Sales Order Type must be chosen before a Sales Order can be created from this Opportunity
ErrorConditionFormula: IF(AND( IWM_Sales_Order_Req__c, ISBLANK(TEXT( IWM_Sales_Order_Type__c ))), True, False)

ErrorMessage: You must set a Sales Order line type if a sales order is required
ErrorConditionFormula: IF( AND( Opportunity.IWM_Sales_Order_Req__c, ISBLANK(TEXT( IWM_Sales_Order_Line_type__c))), true, false)

ErrorMessage: You must ensure that the product you are using has a related item in OPI to be able to create a Sales Order line
ErrorConditionFormula: IF(AND(ISBLANK( Product2.link_OPIItem_Id__c), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT( IWM_Sales_Order_Line_type__c )))), True, False)

ErrorMessage: Please complete the Technical Evaluation before proceeding with the deal.
ErrorConditionFormula:
AND(
 RecordType.Name == "Xeretec Sales Process",
NOT(
OR(
ISPICKVAL(StageName , "Open"),
ISPICKVAL(StageName , "Qualify & Develop"),
ISPICKVAL(StageName , "Technical Evaluation"),
ISPICKVAL(StageName , "Closed Lost")
)
),
OR(
ISBLANK(TEXT(Technical_Approval_Status__c)),
NOT(ISPICKVAL(Technical_Approval_Status__c, "Approved"))
),
ISPICKVAL(Lines_Of_Business__c, "Print"),
IF(RecordType.Id == "0124K000000Mg7T",TRUE,FALSE)
)

ErrorMessage: You cannot modify this opportunity given its current stage and/or billing status.
ErrorConditionFormula:
OR(
    AND(
        ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Won'),
        $User.ProfileId = '00e8e0000011h2F',
        NOT(ISCHANGED(Notifiy__c))
    ),
    AND(
        ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Won'),
        Billed_Status__c = 'Completely Billed',
        NOT(ISCHANGED(Notifiy__c))
    )
)

ErrorMessage: LINE - You cannot modify or add line items to this opportunity given its current stage and/or billing status.
ErrorConditionFormula:
OR(
  AND(
     ISPICKVAL(Opportunity.StageName, 'Closed Won'),
     $User.ProfileId = '00e8e0000011h2F'
  ),
  AND(
     ISPICKVAL(Opportunity.StageName, 'Closed Won'),
     Opportunity.Billed_Status__c = 'Completely Billed',
     NOT(ISCHANGED(CP_Override__c)),
     $User.Id <> '0054K0000051F7A' 
  )
)

ErrorMessage: Cannot move to ClosedWon until Compliance have Approved
You must enter a Loss Reason when the Opportunity is set to Closed Lost.
Credit Safe has not been refreshed in last 90 days
Ensure the customer is set to active, active flag is ticked and the customers email is populated.
Description: Checks account info updated before closed won so sales orders create.

ErrorMessage: You can not edit this opportunity.
You can not edit this opportunity.
You can't choose "Supplies" value. Please choose another one.
Populate Line of Business field.
Description: error if line of business blank.

ErrorMessage: Funding type Subscription can not be chosen in a Transactional record
Description: If Opp is Transactional then Subscription can not be chosen in funding type

ErrorMessage: This product cannot be added to this line of business. Please choose software items only.
Description: If Opp is Line Of Business Sofware then the Product Catagory has to be the same

ErrorMessage: The Value of the quantity must be more than 0
The Account Name field must be populated to save this opportunity.
Description: The account name must be populated.

ErrorMessage: Please complete the Technical Evaluation before proceeding with the deal.
ErrorConditionFormula:
AND(
    OR(
       $UserRole.Id = "00EPx00000DrcPaMAJ",
       $UserRole.Id = "00EPx00000DrcPZMAZ",
       $UserRole.Id = "00EPx00000DrcPYMAZ"
    ),

    RecordType.Name = "Xeretec Sales Process",
    NOT(
        OR(
            ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Open"),
            ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Qualify & Develop"),
            ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Technical Evaluation"),
            ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost")
        )
    ),
    OR(
        ISBLANK(TEXT(Technical_Approval_Status__c)),
        NOT(ISPICKVAL(Technical_Approval_Status__c, "Approved"))
    ),
    ISPICKVAL(Lines_Of_Business__c, "Digital Workspace"),
    IF(RecordType.Id = "0124K000000Mg7T", TRUE, FALSE)
)

ErrorMessage: The account is not linked to Creditsafe or is missing a company number or DC trade number. Please link the account with Creditsafe.
ErrorConditionFormula:
AND(
OR(
$Profile.Name = "AoC - Sales",
$Profile.Name = "AoC - Sales RO",
$Profile.Name = "Sales Team",
$UserRole.Name = "Supplies"
),

OR(
AND( ISBLANK(Account.DC_Trade_Number__c),
ISBLANK(Account.comp_house__Company_Number__c)
),
ISBLANK(Account.CS_APP__Connect_Id__c)
),
NOT(Account.Bypass_Creditsafe__c),
    NOT(
        ISPICKVAL(StageName , "Closed Lost")          /* moving to / already Closed Lost */
        ||
        ISCHANGED(Loss_Reason__c)                     /* editing Loss Reason */
    )
)
Description: Stops an opportunity being created if account has not been credit safe checked or has a Company Reg/DC Trade.

ErrorMessage: Quantity must be 1 or more
You cannot modify or delete Opportunity Products when the Opportunity is Closed Won.
